title: Rusty Sword
description: An old rusty sword. I was forged by hell... The retexture of the Netherite sword
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459e3cc8c06ee3c115384ebed753fa2df2d9f791.png)

## Description
> This resource pack replaces the Netherite sword with the old infernal one. 
> If you like this style, then you will definitely like this resource pack! Basically, this resource pack was based on my [Rusty Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rusty-mace)

## Описание
> Этот ресурс пак заменяет нетеритский меч на ржавый.
> Если вам нравится этот стиль, то вам определенно понравится этот ресурс пак! В принципе, этот ресурс пак был основан на моем [Rusty Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rusty-mace)

## 
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c02878041b97f467b9d54a649ba903c6194571c.png)
Everything was rusted long ago... Probably from the abundance of blood...
